task_updates.executor_notes: Expanded `src/tools/video-editor/lib/shot-group-commands.test.ts` with stale-`trackId` fixtures for image and video groups whose stored `trackId` is `V1` while their clips actually live on `V2`. Added regression coverage for pin, unpin, update, delete, switch-to-final-video, update-to-latest-video, and switch-to-images paths. The tests verify both that each builder still operates when called with the resolved track id and, for builders that return the group in `pinnedShotGroupsOverride`, that the emitted `trackId` is corrected to `V2`. Verification: baseline `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/` passed before edits; post-change `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/lib/shot-group-commands.test.ts` and `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/` both passed.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. The new stale-track test cases verify both sides of the requirement: they prove the builders still find and operate on a group whose stored `trackId` is stale, and the update/switch mutation cases assert that the returned `pinnedShotGroupsOverride` entries self-heal from `V1` to `V2` in the emitted output.
